    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.resource that return types with arguments of type SkillRecord
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SkillRecord>
    ResourceController.assignSkillToResource(Long resourceId, SkillRecord record)
    Assigns a skill to a resource.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Set<SkillRecord>>
    ResourceController.getSkillsForResource(Long resourceId)
    Returns all skills of a resource.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Set<SkillRecord>>
    ResourceController.getSkillsForResourceInGroup(Long groupId, Long resourceId)
    Returns all skills of a resource, filtered by resource group.
